title: Digital India Corporation Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Digital India Corporation (DIC) Graphic Designer Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of Digital India Corporation. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DIC Graphic Designer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Graduate/Postgraduate in any discipline with 3-5 years of relevant experience. Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and After Effects is required. MFA/BFA or Certificate courses in Graphic Designing/Multi Media/Video Creation/Editing are considered an added advantage. Knowledge of AI software such as ChatGPT and Sora is also an added advantage.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Digital India Corporation to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Digital India Corporation Graphic Designer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Graphic Designer post is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the essential qualifications for the Graphic Designer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates or postgraduates in any discipline with 3-5 years of relevant experience. Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and After Effects is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by Digital India Corporation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for the Graphic Designer position?
faq.answer: The Graphic Designer position is a contractual role, as indicated in the official notification released by Digital India Corporation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies for the Graphic Designer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Graphic Designer in the Digital India Corporation recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any added advantages for the Graphic Designer qualification?
faq.answer: Yes, having an MFA/BFA or certificate courses in Graphic Designing/Multi Media/Video Creation/Editing is an added advantage. Knowledge of AI software like ChatGPT and Sora is also beneficial.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Graphic Designer position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Digital India Corporation website or the provided application link before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Graphic Designer role primarily involves an online application. Further details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Digital India Corporation?
faq.answer: The official website of Digital India Corporation is mygov.in. You can visit this website for more information and to access the application portal.
